documentation.value: Evaluates an expression in a modified filter context. Each filter argument modifies the context in which the expression is evaluated.
The expression to evaluate (typically an aggregation like SUM, COUNT, etc.).
A boolean expression or table expression that defines a filter.
Additional filter expressions.
Returns a table that contains only the rows that satisfy the filter expression.
The table to filter.
A boolean expression evaluated for each row of the table.
Iterates over a table, evaluates the expression for each row, and returns the sum of all values.
The table to iterate over.
An expression evaluated for each row to produce a number.
Counts the number of rows in a table or table expression.
The table whose rows to count.
Returns a related value from another table using an existing relationship. Must be used in a row context.
A column from a related table (many-to-one or one-to-one side).
Returns all rows in a table or all values in a column, ignoring any filters that have been applied.
A table or column reference to remove filters from.
Returns a one-column table of distinct values from the specified column, respecting the current filter context.
The column from which to return distinct values.
Iterates over a table, evaluates the expression for each row, and returns the arithmetic mean of all values.
The table to iterate over.
An expression evaluated for each row to produce a number.
Iterates over a table, evaluates the expression for each row, and returns the largest value.
The table to iterate over.
An expression evaluated for each row.
Iterates over a table, evaluates the expression for each row, and returns the smallest value.
The table to iterate over.
An expression evaluated for each row.

signatures.label: SWITCH(expression, value1, result1, value2, result2, ..., else_result): value

documentation.value: Evaluates an expression against a list of values and returns the corresponding result. Returns else_result if no match is found.
The expression to evaluate and compare against each value.
First value to match against.
Result returned when expression matches value1.
Optional default result if no value matches.
Returns one value if a condition is TRUE and another value if it is FALSE.
A boolean expression to evaluate.
The value returned when the condition is TRUE.
The value returned when the condition is FALSE.
Performs safe division and returns an alternate result (default BLANK) when the denominator is zero.
The dividend.
The divisor.
Optional value returned when denominator is 0. Defaults to BLANK.
